visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A close-up view shows a person's hands holding a green bag and pouring many small, multi-colored spheres into a clear glass bowl on a gray marble surface. The candy pieces are white, yellow, blue, and green. (2) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white dress and a cream cardigan, stands in a large retail warehouse. She holds a large teal bag of candy. Behind her are massive stacks of the same product. Lighting is bright and even. (3) Two women are seen from the waist up sitting in a brightly lit indoor living room. One woman wears a pink beret. They hold a bowl of the colorful candies and examine individual pieces closely before tasting them with expressive facial gestures. One holds a small blue candy piece towards the camera lens.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 小朋友 幾歲了還要吃糖. (3) [Subtitle]: 這個不一樣. (4) [Subtitle]: 哪裡不一樣? (5) [Variety]: 味道 冷. (6) [Subtitle]: 這個呢是冷凍乾燥的彩虹糖. (7) [Variety]: 味道竟然變這樣!. (8) [Subtitle]: 比較健康. (9) [Subtitle]: 哪裡比較健康? (10) [Subtitle]: 因為它是冷凍乾燥. (11) [Subtitle]: 小嬰兒跟寵物的食品乾燥就算了 糖果為什麼要乾燥啊? (12) [Subtitle]: 現在就是冷凍乾燥在每一個料理上. (13) [Subtitle]: 我們來試試看跟Skittles有什麼差別. (14) [Subtitle]: 而且它這個顏色 真的很吸引人. (15) [Subtitle]: 整個... 259元. (16) [Subtitle]: 然後排在這. (17) [Subtitle]: 它聲音聽起來也很凍乾. (18) [Subtitle]: 這樣會好吃嗎? (19) [Subtitle]: 冷凍乾燥彩虹糖. (20) [Subtitle]: 你有吃過寵物凍乾 那你有吃過凍乾的彩虹糖嗎? (21) [Subtitle]: 它是做成凍乾的彩虹糖. (22) [Subtitle]: 吃下去呢就是完全不會黏牙. (23) [Variety]: 完全不會黏牙. (24) [Subtitle]: 你咬下去第一口它就會整個那個水果糖的味道在你嘴巴裡爆發! (25) [Variety]: 爆發!. (26) [Subtitle]: 我自己最喜歡藍色的味道. (27) [Subtitle]: 我覺得非常的童玩復古. (28) [Variety]: 童玩復古. (29) [Subtitle]: 它顏色也非常繽紛. (30) [Subtitle]: 你平常很愛吃糖果的話 你真的可以試試看. (31) [Subtitle]: 這是一個很特別的 吃起來有點像那個馬林糖蛋白霜那種空氣感. (32) [Variety]: 那種空氣感. (33) [Subtitle]: 新奇度滿分.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female creators, one briefly interacting off-camera or via editing transitions.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair, wearing a white dress and cream-colored cardigan. The other woman wears a white top and a pink beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a large Costco warehouse with green stacks of candy bags. Second scene is an indoor living room with a couch, soft pillows, and shelves of plush toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A series of sharp, percussive clinking sounds occur as small hard objects strike glass, creating a bright metallic resonance. This is immediately followed by the start of a high-tempo electronic pop track with a strong 4/4 beat. No vocals are present in this very brief opening. (2) An energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone. A second female voice asks questions off-screen in a slightly more casual but curious tone. The background music remains upbeat and consistent. Occasional plastic rustling sounds are heard as the bag is handled and moved. (3) Two distinct female voices engage in a lively discussion about taste. Their speech is fast and energetic with frequent rising intonations indicating surprise and delight. Distinct crisp crunching sounds occur as they bite into the freeze-dried candy. The music continues in the background, maintaining a cheerful atmosphere.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific snack found at Costco by highlighting its novelty as a freeze-dried version of traditional colorful candy. It uses a combination of on-site shopping footage and a home-based taste test to build credibility and demonstrate the product's unique 'airy' texture.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the product, shows the price, and encourages viewers to try it based on a positive review.
endorsementObject: We Crush On Freeze Dried Rainbow Bursts

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy short-form video content typical of social media marketing trends.
